name: PHASE-52 A-1 S366 — E2E content-path lift through the REAL kb.ingest_content: zero-chunk claim → mock _discovery.search returns {url, content} → _ingest falls through to the REAL kb.ingest_content (score-by-URL, NO fetch; mock embed via ingestCtx._client) → chunk/store → re-retrieve → re-cite SUCCESS → §8 PASS → advance QUALITY_JUDGE. Asserts discovery_ingests>=1 ∧ discovery_cited>=1 + a REPUTABLE text/plain SourceRecord persisted for the discovered URL.
